pullRequest.title: feat(address): add secondary_address() method
pullRequest.body:
# I have made things!

## Checklist

- [x] I have read [contributing guidelines](https://github.com/lk-geimfari/mimesis/blob/master/CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md)
- [x] I'm sure that I did not unrelated changes in this pull request
- [x] I have created at least one test case for the changes I have made
- [x] I have added myself to the [CONTRIBUTORS.rst](https://github.com/lk-geimfari/mimesis/blob/master/CONTRIBUTORS.rst)
- [x] I have updated the documentation for the changes I have made

## Related issues

- Closes #1472 

## Description

Adds the `secondary_address()` method to the `Address` provider, enabling generation of secondary address components like apartment numbers, suite numbers, etc.

**Changes**

- Added `secondary_address()` method to `mimesis/providers/address.py`
- Added locale-specific patterns (`secondary_address_fmt`) to 48 `address.json` data files using _Gemini PRO_
- Added tests in `tests/test_providers/test_localized/test_address.py`

**Usage**

```python
from mimesis import Address
from mimesis.enums import Locale

addr_en = Address(Locale.EN)
print(addr_en.secondary_address())  # "Apt. 42", "Suite 1200", etc.

addr_br = Address(Locale.PT_BR)
print(addr_br.secondary_address())  # "Bloco A Apto. 123", "Quadra 5 Lote 12", etc.
```

## Supported Locales
All 48 address locales now have culturally appropriate secondary address patterns.

## Verification
- All 8699 tests pass
- Linting passes

pullRequest.title: feat: add e164 parameter to phone_number for E.164 format output
pullRequest.body:
# I have made things!

## Checklist

- [x] I have read [contributing guidelines](https://github.com/lk-geimfari/mimesis/blob/master/CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md)
- [x] I'm sure that I did not unrelated changes in this pull request
- [x] I have created at least one test case for the changes I have made
- [x] I have added myself to the [CONTRIBUTORS.rst](https://github.com/lk-geimfari/mimesis/blob/master/CONTRIBUTORS.rst)
- [x] I have updated the documentation for the changes I have made

## Related issues

- Closes #1635

## Description

Adds an optional `e164` parameter to the `phone_number()` method in the Person provider. When `e164=True`, the method returns phone numbers in E.164 international format (e.g., `+14155552671`) by stripping all non-digit characters except the leading plus sign.

**Usage:**
```python
from mimesis import Person
person = Person()
person.phone_number(e164=True)  # Returns: +14155552671
```
